[http://www.kinguin.net/ Kinguin] |created= 2015-04-02 |disbanded= |trades= }}{{TOCRWI}} '''Copenhagen Wolves Academy''' was an European team. == History == '''Copenhagen Wolves Academy''' was announced on April 2, 2015 when the team acquired the roster previously known as {{bl|LowLandLions.White}}, consisting of {{bl|Morsu}}, {{bl|Kirei}}, {{bl|CozQ}}, {{bl|Vizility}}, and {{bl|Hybrid (Glenn Doornenbal)|Hybrid}}.[http://www.cphwolves.gg/news/wolves-signs-academy-lol-team/ Wolves signs Academy LoL team] ''cphwolves.gg'' At the time, the team had just defeated [[Gamers2]] 2-0 in the [[2015 EU Challenger Series/Spring Playoffs|EUCS Spring Playoffs]], guaranteeing them at least a spot in the [[Riot League Championship Series/Europe/2015 Season/Summer Promotion|LCS Summer Promotion Tournament]]. == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} ==Organization== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Position {{listplayersp|JLK|dk|Jakob Lund Kristensen|'''Chief Executive Officer'''}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== ==See Also== ==External Links== ==References==
